Item 1A. Risk Factors

Amazon.com, Inc. faces intense competition from a wide range of online and offline retailers, marketplaces, and technology companies. Our businesses are rapidly evolving and intensely competitive, and we have many competitors across geographies.

We are subject to numerous laws and regulations in the United States and abroad, particularly with respect to privacy, data protection, competition, consumer protection, and taxation. Compliance with these laws and regulations can be complex and may require significant expense.

Our reliance on third-party suppliers and shipping carriers exposes us to supply chain risks, including capacity constraints, labor disputes, and geopolitical disruption.
